arts.ttl: Hatters end their scoring woes at home as they stun in-form Robins
Bristol City player ratings vs Luton as Robins beaten 3-1 at Kenilworth Road
arts.sum: The Albanian international was restored to the starting line-up in place of George Earthy and was involved in a lot of what Bristol City did well in the first half. Against a physical Luton side, Bristol City were always going to need Ross McCrorie to be at the races and he got more than stuck in down the left flank.

arts.ttl: Luton boost survival bid with win over Bristol City

arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes Nahki Wells contract admission after 'top' Bristol City display vs Sunderland
arts.sum: Liam Manning admits that from his point of view, it is a case of "the sooner the better" when it comes to resolving Nahki Wells' contract situation at Bristol City following the striker's "outstanding" performance in the Reds' win over Sunderland. Nahki Wells' current contract with Bristol City is set to expire at the end of the 2024/25 Championship season
